label: Artemis IV Moon landing
description: NASA's planned Artemis IV mission aims to return astronauts to the lunar surface.

label: Apophis close Earth flyby
description: Asteroid 99942 Apophis is expected to pass unusually close to Earth in a well-modelled trajectory.

label: Unix timestamp reaches 2 billion seconds
description: Unix timestamp counter will reach 2 billion seconds since the current epoch, it has no known critical implications.

label: Year 2038 pressure point
description: Legacy 32-bit Unix systems may fail without mitigation as signed timestamps overflow.

label: ITER demonstration milestone
description: A broad planning window often associated with ITER's long-term fusion demonstration ambitions.

label: Moon landing centenary
description: One hundred years since Apollo 11, likely to become a major global remembrance milestone.

label: Halley's Comet returns
description: The next perihelion of Halley's Comet is astronomically predicted and likely to dominate skywatching coverage.
